flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Salem Community College are 12% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($38.0k vs $43.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Salem Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.1k → $10.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Salem Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Salem Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
